summary: Backend API testing completed for booking date calculation bug fix. All 11 tests passed. The critical bug fix in constants.ts (getDateString() using local timezone instead of UTC) is confirmed working - bookings now appear under the correct day in weekly-bookings admin view.

minor.issue: InsecureKeyLengthWarning - HMAC key is 27 bytes, recommended minimum is 32 bytes for SHA256

critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret key should be at least 32 bytes for secure SHA256 signing (current: 27 bytes)
Frontend Expo tunnel has connectivity issues (520 errors) - this is infrastructure/tunnel related, not code issue
seed_data_creation: Test client user created during testing, one booking exists for 2026-02-24 (Tuesday) 13:15 funzionale
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: The date calculation issue in constants.ts was fixed by using local date components instead of toISOString(). All backend booking date tests pass. Frontend testing was skipped due to Expo tunnel instability.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Off-by-one day bug in booking dates when user timezone is ahead of UTC
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: constants.ts getDateString() used toISOString() which converts to UTC, causing date shift
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed to use local date components (getFullYear(), getMonth(), getDate())

verification_results.test_existing_tuesday_booking: PASSED - Booking for 2026-02-24 appears under Tuesday section correctly
verification_results.test_booking_date_matches_lesson_day: PASSED - All days map to correct Python weekdays
verification_results.test_bookings_appear_under_correct_day: PASSED - New bookings created appear under correct day
